name: Saved by the Lake Men’s AA Support Group
notes:
🤝 A Place for Support & Connection

This new men’s Alcoholics Anonymous group offers a safe, confidential, and encouraging space to share experiences, find strength, and support one another on the journey of recovery.

📣 Help Spread the Word

Your voice can help this group grow into a strong, supportive community.
Invite a friend, share the information, and help make this meeting a success.
